timetracker-desc: Adds a Start/Stop time tracker (Special:TimeTracker) for logging work against jobs and customers.
timetracker-notyourtime: This time belongs to $1. Only that user or a time-tracker admin can change it.
timetracker-delete-has-jobs: This customer still has jobs. Delete or reassign its jobs before deleting the customer.
timetracker-delete-has-tasks: This job still has tasks. Delete or reassign its tasks before deleting the job.
timetracker-delete-check-failed: Can’t confirm whether this still has sub-items right now — please try again in a moment.
timetracker-delete-has-time: This has time logged against it, so it can’t be deleted. Archive it instead, or remove the logged time first.
right-timetracker-editothers: Log and edit time on behalf of other users
timetracker-task-name-reserved: A task cannot be named "$1" — that marks a job’s general (task-less) bucket.
timetracker-none-jobs: No jobs assigned to this customer yet.
timetracker-none-tasks: No tasks for this job yet.
timetracker-timer-elsewhere: You already have a timer running on $1.
timereports-none: No time entries match these filters.
timetracker-api-badbucket: The customer, job, or task for this time entry is invalid.
timetracker-api-badday: The day for this time entry is not a valid date.
timetracker-api-maxhours: A day's entry can be at most $1 hours.
timetracker-api-notimer: You have no running timer to stop.
timereports-pick-week: Jump to the week of this date
